pages.text: Though their oaths are sworn to another, though their souls are bound to a lord they serve with undivided devotion—they shall still answer your call.
For you, recognized by the broken lord of the nether, carry a shard of divine essence wrested from his realm, and this alone compels their service.
They will follow your every command—even if you bid them draw their bows against the Trials cast down from the Lord.
If he is wounded or enters his second phase, you may offer him a vial of Unholy Blood to restore him to his original state.。
